camera.title: Camera
camera.permissionDeniedMessage: Call The Line needs camera access to record clips for line call analysis.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.createFirst: Create your first session to get started

session.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete the session and all its clips.

calibration.title: Court Calibration
calibration.instruction: Tap the 4 corners of the court in order

camera.title: Camera Permission Required
camera.message: We need access to your camera to record tennis matches and detect line calls.
camera.denied: Camera permission was denied. Please enable it in settings.

storage.title: Storage Permission Required
storage.message: We need access to storage to save your recordings.
storage.denied: Storage permission was denied. Please enable it in settings.

permissionDenied.title: Camera Access Required
permissionDenied.body: Call The Line needs camera access to detect ball bounces and make line calls during your match. Without it, the app cannot function.
permissionDenied.instruction: Please open Settings and enable Camera permission for Call The Line.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.camera: Camera error. Please restart the app.
errors.storage: Storage error. Please check available space.
